name: Calm Cloud Interface
description: A SaaS dashboard floats among soft cloud sprites under a friendly cream-to-sky-blue sky. Pointer drift parallaxes both the camera and the layered clouds for a light, approachable, effortless mood.

fields.label: Subheading
fields.default: A calmer place to manage your team, your day, and everything in between. No more clutter, no more friction.

fields.label: Column 1
fields.default:
Built to breathe

A workspace that doesn't pile up. Just what you need, when you need it.

fields.label: Column 2
fields.default:
Made for everyone

From HR to classrooms — friendly defaults that just feel right.

fields.label: Screenshot
fields.description: Any dashboard / app PNG, JPG, WebP, or AVIF. The screen plane derives its aspect from the loaded image.

fields.label: Screen size
fields.description: Overall scale of the screenshot plane in the scene.

fields.label: Screen offset X
fields.description: Nudges the screenshot along the world X axis. Default 0 is centred.

fields.label: Screen offset Y
fields.description: Nudges the screenshot along the world Y axis. Default 0 is centred.

fields.label: Screen tilt
fields.description: Pitch on the screenshot plane. Slightly negative tips the top toward the camera for a gentle product pose.

fields.label: Cloud count
fields.description: Number of cloud sprites stacked at varying depths from z = -8 (back) to z = -2 (close).

fields.label: Cloud color
fields.description: Tint of the soft cloud puffs. Default soft white reads as gentle midday cumulus.

fields.label: Cloud opacity
fields.description: Max alpha of each cloud sprite. 0.7 reads as soft cumulus; toward 1 reads as denser fog banks.

fields.label: Cloud drift speed
fields.description: Base leftward drift over the long cycle. 0 freezes the layer for a still hero.

fields.label: Cloud speed multiplier
fields.description: Overall speed multiplier on top of cloud drift. 1 is the base motion, 1.5 (default) is a brisker daylight breeze, 5 is a fast time-lapse.

fields.label: Sky top color
fields.description: Soft blue at the top of the sky gradient.

fields.label: Pointer camera drift
fields.description: How far the pointer pushes the camera in X and Y. 0.7 reads as a gentle look-around; 0 freezes the camera.

fields.label: Cloud parallax
fields.description: Pointer parallax on the cloud layers. Deeper clouds shift less than closer ones for a real depth feel.

fields.label: Transparent background
fields.description: Drop the sky so the dashboard composites over your existing page background.
